title: Mapping Schema
description: JSON Schema for provider-model mapping definitions in the OpenModels registry

model_id.description: Reference to the canonical model ID (must exist in models registry)

provider_id.description: Reference to the provider ID (must exist in providers registry)

provider_model_name.description: The provider's internal name for this model (as used in their API)

pricing.description: Pricing information for this model at this provider

rate_limits.description: Rate limiting constraints for this model at this provider

requests_per_minute.description: Maximum number of API requests allowed per minute

tokens_per_minute.description: Maximum number of tokens (input + output) allowed per minute

context_window_override.description: Provider-specific context window size override (null if using model's default)

available_regions.description: List of regions where this model is available (must be subset of provider's regions)

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when the mapping entry was created

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when the mapping entry was last updated
